MOTION Notice; For Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-07-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT VALAIDA MASON Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings:
APPEAR: Steve Phillips, Esq. 353-5740 for pltfs & opposing parties; Arnold I. Weber, Esq. 398-4670 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADING AS TO VALAIDA MASON GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. COMPLAINT AS PRESENTLY ALLEGED DOES NOT SET FORTH BASIS FOR SETTING ASIDE DEED TO VALAIDA MASON. WHY DEED ISSUED TO MASON IF PURCHASE WAS FOR PARTNERSHIP? MISTAKE? COMPLAINT REQUIRES FURTHER ALLEGATIONS). (302/AJR/RS) Court Reporter Joe Vickstein, CSR#4780

MOTION Notice; Abate Action Against Deceased Robert R. Mason;
Off Calendar Jan-07-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ROBERT R. MASON Motion To Abate Action Against Deceased Robert R. Mason:
APPEAR: Steve Phillips, Esq. 353-5740 for pltfs & opposing parties; Arnold I. Weber, Esq. 398-4670 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (MOTION TO ABATE DENIED. PARTNERSHIP HAS POWER TO TERMINATE ITS AFFAIRS EVEN THOUGH PARTNERSHIP TERMINATED) without prejudice. Order signed in open court. (302/AJR/RS) Court Reporter Joe Vickstein, CSR#4780
